sourceMovie.title: Good Will Hunting
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Good Will Hunting works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Social Network
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Will Hunting clicked for you, The Social Network (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Dead Poets Society
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Will Hunting clicked for you, Dead Poets Society (1989) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Mind
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Will Hunting clicked for you, A Beautiful Mind (2001) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Lobster
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Will Hunting clicked for you, The Lobster (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good Will Hunting?
faq.answer: Try The Social Network, Dead Poets Society, A Beautiful Mind—each shares DNA with Good Will Hunting while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good Will Hunting?
faq.answer: Good Will Hunting (1997) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good Will Hunting worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
